name: Data Pipeline/ETL
description: A data pipeline and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) architecture for ingesting data from diverse sources, transforming it through processing stages, and loading it into a data warehouse for analytics. Security considerations focus on data classification throughout the pipeline, PII handling during transformation, job isolation to prevent cross-contamination, and strict read/write separation between warehouse consumers and producers.

zones.name: data-sources
zones.description: External and internal data sources providing raw data to the pipeline. Data quality, format, and trustworthiness vary significantly across sources. May include PII, sensitive business data, or potentially malicious content.

zones.name: ingestion
zones.description: The data ingestion layer that extracts data from sources, performs initial validation and schema checks, and stages raw data for processing. Handles diverse formats (CSV, JSON, Parquet, XML) and enforces data quality gates.

zones.name: processing
zones.description: The data transformation and processing tier where raw data is cleaned, enriched, aggregated, and transformed according to business rules. Includes PII detection and masking, data quality checks, and lineage tracking.

zones.name: warehouse
zones.description: The curated data warehouse containing clean, modeled, and governed datasets ready for consumption. Implements column-level security, data masking for sensitive fields, and comprehensive access auditing.

zones.name: analytics
zones.description: The analytics consumption tier where business users and data analysts access curated data through BI tools, dashboards, and ad-hoc query interfaces. Access is read-only with role-based data visibility.

boundaries.name: Processing to Warehouse
controls: Write-only permissions for ETL service accounts
Data quality gate (must pass all checks)

mermaid_template:
flowchart TB
    subgraph sources["Data Sources (Untrusted)"]
        api_src[External APIs]
        file_src[SFTP / File Feeds]
        saas_src[SaaS Exports]
        stream_src[Event Streams]
    end
    subgraph ingest["Ingestion (Semi-Trusted)"]
        connector(Data Connectors)
        validator(Schema Validator)
        quarantine[(Quarantine Storage)]
        staging[(Raw / Staging Layer)]
    end
    subgraph process["Processing (Trusted)"]
        etl(ETL / Transformation Jobs)
        quality(Data Quality Framework)
        pii(PII Detection / Masking)
        lineage(Lineage Tracker)
    end
    subgraph wh["Warehouse (Highly Trusted)"]
        dwh[(Data Warehouse)]
        curated[(Curated Datasets)]
        dims[(Dimension Tables)]
        facts[(Fact Tables)]
    end
    subgraph analytics_tier["Analytics (Trusted)"]
        bi(BI / Dashboard Tool)
        reports(Reporting Engine)
        notebook(Data Science Notebook)
        adhoc(Ad-Hoc Query Tool)
    end
    api_src -->|API Pull| connector
    file_src -->|SFTP| connector
    saas_src -->|Export| connector
    stream_src -->|Subscribe| connector
    connector --> validator
    validator -->|Valid| staging
    validator -->|Invalid| quarantine
    staging --> etl
    etl --> quality
    quality --> pii
    pii --> lineage
    etl -->|Load| dwh
    dwh --> curated
    dwh --> dims
    dwh --> facts
    curated -->|Read-Only| bi
    curated -->|Read-Only| reports
    curated -->|Read-Only| notebook
    curated -->|Read-Only| adhoc
